description: Implement full authentication flow using Supabase Auth (mocked for demo). This includes: a login page (/login) with email/password form, a signup page (/signup) with email/password registration, logout functionality, password reset flow with forgot-password and /reset-password pages, persistent session management via onAuthStateChange, a profiles table in Supabase with auto-creation trigger on signup, and an AuthContext provider that exposes user state throughout the app. New users default to the Requestor role. The auth system coexists with demo mode — when in demo mode, auth is bypassed entirely. When not in demo mode, unauthenticated users are redirected to /login from any /app/* route.

stories.title: Create AuthContext provider
stories.notes: AuthProvider + useAuth hook. Stubbed signIn/signUp/signOut/resetPassword. Wraps app in __root.tsx.

stories.title: Create login page
stories.notes: Login at /login with email/password validation, error display, demo/auth redirect.

stories.title: Create signup page
stories.notes: Signup at /signup with 4-field form, validation, success state with check-email message.

stories.title: Create forgot password page
stories.notes: Forgot password at /forgot-password with email input and success confirmation.

stories.title: Create reset password page
stories.notes: Reset password at /reset-password with new password + confirm + success state.

stories.title: Route protection for /app/* routes
stories.notes: Guard in app.tsx: requires demo OR auth. Loading spinner while resolving. Redirects to /login.

stories.title: User menu in header with sign out
stories.notes: DropdownMenu in Header with Demo Admin label, Exit Demo / Sign Out, Settings. Navigate-first pattern to avoid guard race.

stories.title: Auth form error handling and edge cases
stories.notes: ErrorAlert component, inline field errors, errors clear on input change.
